resolution_details: A project-local .venv at d:\ocn\.venv\ contains scikit-learn 1.9.0, which is the exact version the frozen R4 artifacts were pickled with. The eval was run with HF_HUB_OFFLINE=1 using the .venv Python, producing real format_shift_metrics.csv with 8 variants x 436 evaluated candidates.

previous_block.details: R4 frozen artifacts were pickled with scikit-learn 1.9.0 but previous environment (Python 3.10) had 1.4.1.post1. LogisticRegression.multi_class attribute removed in 1.9.0 but accessed by 1.4.1 predict_proba.
previous_block.r4_prediction_error: AttributeError: LogisticRegression object has no attribute multi_class
